name: Border Beam
description: An animated border effect where a glowing beam travels along the border of an element, creating a dynamic highlight that traces the perimeter.
whenToUse: Use for highlighting cards, feature boxes, pricing tiers, or any container that needs an eye-catching animated border.

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the beam highlight in pixels

props.name: duration
props.description: Time in seconds for one full border loop

props.name: borderWidth
props.description: Width of the border in pixels

props.name: colorFrom
props.description: Starting gradient color of the beam

props.name: colorTo
props.description: Ending gradient color of the beam
